case_title: MILEY MICHAEL VS MOTION WORKS INTERNATIONAL INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILEY MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTION WORKS INTERNATIONAL INC. $2,218.75 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,257.75, PLTF AGREES TO NOT EXECUTE UNLESS STOCK TRANSFER "DOES NOT GO THROUGH". IF PLTF MUST EXECUTE ON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,218.75 FILED BY MILEY MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MOTION WORKS INTERNATIONAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOTION WORKS INTERNATIONAL INC.
